label: 第127話
source_locator: 単行本15巻 目次 p.47
summary_short: 東堂は呪術師が仲間の死に意味を求めず、託されたものを背負って進む存在だと虎杖へ説く。虎杖は再び立ち上がり、東堂とともに真人へ挑む。
summary_full: 虎杖は宿儺の虐殺、七海と釘崎を救えなかったことを理由に戦えないと訴える。東堂は、術師は仲間の死へ安易な意味を求めず、託されたものへの答えを探し続ける存在だと説き、虎杖を再び立たせる。新田新は虎杖にも術式を施し、既存の傷はこれ以上悪化しないと伝えて釘崎を搬送する。東堂が不義遊戯で真人を翻弄し、復帰した虎杖は七海の言葉を胸に黒閃を決める。

candidate_evidence.summary_short_legacy: Unable to forgive himself, 悠仁 's resolve is broken and he's ready to give up. 東堂葵 reminds 悠仁 that their allies are never truly defeated. The only punishment a jujutsu sorcerer faces is fighting until they can discover what it is they've been entrusted with. Determined to honor 七海 's memory, 悠仁 steps up beside 東堂 ready to face 真人 once again.
candidate_evidence.summary_full_legacy: 真人 attacks the newcomers after 悠仁 admits he's given up. Helpless and trembling on the ground in front of 東堂 and 新 , 悠仁 explains that he can't fight anymore. Not only did 野薔薇 perish in front of his eyes, but 七海 was killed by 真人 as well. 新 is shocked even a grade 1 sorcerer was defeated recently. To add to 悠仁's suffering, 宿儺 slaughtered potentially dozens of people and 悠仁 felt he needed to help others to compensate. However, he feels as if he failed completely in that regard. 悠仁 wanted to avoid feeling nothing but a murderer, but now that's the exact position he's in. Crying and writhing on the ground, 悠仁 expresses that he simply can't forgive himself. Enticed by 悠仁's suffering, 真人 jumps at the group of sorcerers with his arm shaped into a thorned weapon. 東堂 claps his hands and activates 不義遊戯 to switch 真人's position in the air with 新 behind him. 真人 attempts to turn around and attack 東堂, but the third-year student switches the curse 's position with 悠仁's. Taken off guard, 真人 is left wide open to a powerful kick that sends him reeling towards 新. 東堂 quickly swaps 新 and 真人 again and takes position in front of his juniors to face off against the special grade alone. " What have you been entrusted with? " Impressed, 真人 laughs and admits to himself that 東堂's technique is extremely disorienting despite knowing how it works. At the same time, 東堂 tells 悠仁 not to limit himself to sins or misfortunate. All of them are jujutsu sorcerers, including 七海 and 野薔薇. 東堂 believes as long as they keep on living, those who have passed on will never have truly been defeated. He adds that looking for logic in meaning and death can defile the memories of the death, but 東堂 still asks 悠仁 what he's been entrusted with. 東堂 tells 悠仁 that he doesn't need to answer right now. However, until he does, the first-year can never stop fighting. 東堂 believes that is the only punishment jujutsu sorcerers must endure. He expresses this to 悠仁 and runs ahead to fight 真人. 悠仁 apologizes to 七海 for almost running away and promises to honor his sacrifice. 新 quickly treats 悠仁's injuries by applying his 術式 . He informs 悠仁 that his injuries won't get any worse from here on out unless he sustains new ones. 新 has already done the same for 野薔薇. He admits that she doesn't have a pulse and isn't breathing, but encourages 悠仁 by adding that there isn't a zero percent chance of survival. After trying to instill some hope in 悠仁, 新 takes 野薔薇 and retreats out of the station. 真人 attacks 東堂 and tries to split himself a few different ways to outmaneuver his opponent. However, 東堂 proves to be efficient at avoiding 真人 while staying back away from 悠仁. A small transfigured human behind 東堂 transforms into a large spike, but the third year avoids the attack. It barely cuts the sorcerer's shirt and 真人 is disappointed his opponent didn't clap Even so, 真人 is confident after tapping into the power of 黒閃 , hoping to do so once again. He believes it's drawing him ever closer to the true essence of his soul. 悠仁 back in the fight! 東堂 suddenly claps again and interrupts 真人's train of thought. 悠仁 appears before the 呪霊, back in the fight. He charges his fist with 呪力 and reminds himself of 七海's last words: " You've got it from here ". 悠仁 also silently apologizes to his fallen mentor for almost using his sins as an excuse to run and promises to take on his share of suffering in the future. Focused and recommitted to the battle, 悠仁 unleashes the sparks of black on 真人, destroying the curse's arm with 黒閃! 真人 is knocked back but quickly heals his wound. Amused, the curse smiles and says that 悠仁 is back from the dead. 東堂 welcomes him back into the battle and 悠仁 stands ready to fight beside him.

candidate_evidence.techniques_raw_text: 東堂葵の術式 不義遊戯 新田新の術式 新's 名称不明の生得術式 術式 真人の術式 黒閃 無為転変 虎杖悠仁の術式 黒閃

key_events_verified_phase7: 東堂が虎杖へ術師の責務を説く
新田新が虎杖へ傷の悪化を止める術式を使う
新田新が釘崎を搬送する
虎杖が戦線復帰して真人へ黒閃を当てる
verification_notes_phase7: 集英社公式14～16巻目次と巻概要、日本語の原作漫画巻別記事、旧候補資料を話単位で突合した第七段階。単行本各ページの直接最終照合前。
